name: agentplane-attestations
description: Hackathon MVP for generating and verifying agent work attestations.

scripts.adapt:agentplane:pass: node src/cli.mjs adapt --adapter agentplane --input examples/agentplane-runtime-passing.json --output artifacts/passing-bundle.json
scripts.adapt:agentplane:fail: node src/cli.mjs adapt --adapter agentplane --input examples/agentplane-runtime-failing.json --output artifacts/failing-bundle.json
